2311240.name: Loom
2311240.description:
Create your own Natural Language Processing systems and APIs quickly and conveniently with Loom, a low-code graphical IDE (Integrated Development Environment) that lets you leverage the power of OpenAI's GPT-3 and CoHere AI.

Features:
+ Support for OpenAI and CoHereAI's GPT APIs
+ Low code modular design
+ Built-in web server to easily create NLP APIs without any coding knowledge.
+ Support for Java style scripting via Groovy
